case_title: JOANNA FINKELSTEIN ET AL VS. JEANNE SCHLOTZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,260.15 FILED BY FINKELSTEIN, JOANNA FINKELSTEIN, TOBIAS AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLOTZ, JEANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-07-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS JOANNA AND TOBIAS FINKELSTEIN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEANNE SCHLOTZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,959.62. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED MAR-03-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLOTZ, JEANNE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-16-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (FOR APRIL 15, 2021 HEARING AT 8:30AM) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHLOTZ, JEANNE
